description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs using the default Docker image and the docker runner tag. Define my_build_job_1 in the build stage that runs "/bin/echo This is a mock build job", "date > date.txt", and "ls -lh date.txt", and publishes the generated date.txt as an artifact. Define my_build_job_2 in the test stage that runs "/bin/echo This is a mock test job" and "ls -lh date.txt". Define my_build_job_3 in the deploy stage that runs "/bin/echo This is a mock deploy job" and "ls -lh date.txt". No services, caches, or special rules are required.
